title: Grilled Peruvian Mussels Brochettes
description: A Peruvian-inspired dish featuring succulent mussels and flavorful brochettes, perfect for a quick and delicious meal.

ingredients.name: Peruvian-Style Marinade
ingredients.notes: Mix 1/4 cup olive oil, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1 tablespoon aji amarillo pepper paste, and 1 tablespoon lime juice

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, combine mussels, Peruvian-Style Marinade, and 1/4 cup chopped cilantro. Toss to coat.
4. Grill brochettes for 3-4 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
5. Grill mussels for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they open.
6. Serve mussels in brochettes, garnished with aerated lemon and additional cilantro if desired.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
